name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvFcltyCatXrefExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT FCLTY_TYP_CD, PROV_CAT_CD, WEB_SRCH_IN, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.FCLTY_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_D WHERE FCLTY_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK NOT IN (0,1) ) SELECT FCLTY_TYP_CD, PROV_CAT_CD, 1 AS SEQ_NO, WEB_SRCH_IN, USER_ID, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK)) IN ('UNK','NA','') THEN CAST('1753-01-01' AS DATETIME) ELSE CAST(LEFT(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,5,2)+'-'+RIGHT(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,2) AS DATETIME) END AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte
